recommendations.title: Armadillo
recommendations.overview: Danish soldiers are sent to Afghanistan in 2009 for 6 months, to help stabilize the country against the Taliban. They're stationed on Armadillo military base in Helman province. Unlike other war movies, this is the real deal – no actors.

recommendations.title: Stop-Loss
recommendations.overview: A veteran soldier returns from his completed tour of duty in Iraq, only to find his life turned upside down when he is arbitrarily ordered to return to field duty by the Army.

recommendations.title: Alien Outpost
recommendations.overview: A documentary crew follows an elite unit of soldiers in the wake of an alien invasion.

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: Robot Riot
recommendations.overview: Unconscious soldiers are dropped into a testing site only to discover their memories have been wiped and that once docile machines are the new intelligence.

recommendations.title: Shock Waves
recommendations.overview: Visitors to a remote island discover that a reclusive Nazi commandant has been breeding a group of zombie soldiers.

recommendations.title: Mutant Chronicles
recommendations.overview: It's the year 2707. Earth's natural resources have all but been exhausted by mankind. Battles rage for the remainder between the competing Corporations. During one such battle the seal is broken and awakens an ancient and deadly machine that was once

recommendations.title: The Platform
recommendations.overview: A slab of food descends down a vertical facility. The residents above eat heartily, leaving those below starving and desperate. A rebellion is imminent.

recommendations.title: The Last Days on Mars
recommendations.overview: On the last day of the first manned mission to Mars, a crew member of Tantalus Base believes he has made an astounding discovery – fossilized evidence of bacterial life. Unwilling to let the relief crew claim all the glory, he disobeys orders to pack

recommendations.title: Kajaki
recommendations.overview: British soldiers guarding the Kajaki Dam set out to rescue a three-man team after one of them loses a leg to a landmine.
